name: BLAST Algorithm
description: BLAST (Basic Local Alignment Search Tool): heuristic for fast sequence database search. Phase 1 — Seed: split query into W-mers; build neighborhood (words scoring above T); hash lookup for exact matches in DB. Phase 2 — Extend: extend seed in both directions without gaps until score drops below threshold; two-hit method: extend only when two hits on same diagonal within distance A. Phase 3 — Gapped: for high-scoring hits, run DP (Smith-Waterman) on segment. Much faster than full DP while retaining sensitivity.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["Input: query Q, database DB\nParameters: W, T, S"]
    B1["Seed: Split Q into W-mers\nBuild neighborhood above threshold T"]
    C1["Hash: Lookup W-mers in DB\nFind seed matches"]
    D1{"Two hits on same\ndiagonal within A?"}
    E1["Extend: Ungapped extension\nboth directions until score drops"]
    F1{"Score above\nthreshold S?"}
    G1["Gapped: Run DP on segment\nSmith-Waterman"]
    H1["Output: Alignments\nsorted by score"]
    A1 --> B1
    B1 --> C1
    C1 --> D1
    D1 -->|Yes| E1
    D1 -->|No| C1
    E1 --> F1
    F1 -->|Yes| G1
    F1 -->|No| C1
    G1 --> H1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    classDef blue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    class A1 red
    class B1,C1,E1,G1 yellow
    class D1,F1 green
    class H1 blue
